scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,ui -c cyan,magenta "./core/target/release/affini serve ." "npm run dev --prefix ui"
scripts.dev:mypa: concurrently -n server,ui -c cyan,magenta "./core/target/release/affini serve ../mypa" "npm run dev --prefix ui"
scripts.build: cd core && cargo build --release && cd ../ui && npm run build
